description: Agentic AI Maturity Scorecard for GTCX Compliance Gateway

pillars.name: Supervision
pillars.description: Human oversight of AI-initiated actions before consequential effects

metrics.name: Mutating tool approval gating
metrics.description: All mutating tool invocations require explicit approval context
metrics.evidence: tools/compliance-gateway/src/auth.mjs:buildAccessProfile requires valid approval ticket + approvedBy + reason + idempotencyKey

metrics.name: Audit trail for every AI action
metrics.description: Every compliance query and tool call is logged with principal, timestamp, and outcome
metrics.evidence: tools/compliance-gateway/src/server.mjs logs all queries with routing, authz, and usage; replay-protection emits audit events

metrics.name: Real-time anomaly detection
metrics.description: Unusual query patterns or tool usage trigger alerts
metrics.evidence: tools/anomaly-detector/detector.mjs: 5 rules (query spike, mutating tool, replay rejection, unknown DID, off-hours admin); CI-validated with synthetic data (6/6 tests pass); docs/architecture/anomaly-detection.md: approved architecture. Deployed to staging EKS as CronJob (every 5min) with Prometheus monitoring. Test job completed: 5 rules evaluated, no anomalies detected.

pillars.name: Integrity
pillars.description: Data and behavior integrity guarantees for AI systems

metrics.name: Replay protection for signed requests
metrics.description: Mobile queue integrity payloads are cryptographically verified
metrics.evidence: tools/replay-protection/src/verifier.mjs: ReplayVerifier verifies nonce, timestamp, bodyHash, headersHash, envelopeHash, and Ed25519 signature

metrics.name: Audit immutability
metrics.description: Audit database cannot be modified after write
metrics.evidence: infra/scripts/test-audit-immutability.sh: live privilege check + negative DML probe in CI; audit DB runs as separate user with no UPDATE/DELETE privileges

metrics.name: Tamper-evident release evidence
metrics.description: Release artifacts are signed and SBOM-attested
metrics.evidence: .github/workflows/build-push-ecr.yml: Cosign keyless signing + SBOM generation; generate-release-evidence.mjs produces immutable evidence bundles

metrics.name: WORM audit storage
metrics.description: Audit events stored with cryptographic proof of immutability
metrics.evidence: infra/terraform/modules/worm-audit/main.tf: S3 Object Lock in COMPLIANCE mode, KMS encryption, deny-unencrypted/deny-non-SSL policies. Deployed to production (gtcx-worm-audit-production-af-south-1). Verified via AWS CLI: COMPLIANCE mode, 2557-day retention.

pillars.name: Governance
pillars.description: Policies, access control, and accountability for AI systems

metrics.name: Authentication boundary
metrics.description: All AI gateway endpoints require valid bearer token
metrics.evidence: tools/compliance-gateway/src/auth.mjs: authenticateHeaders requires Bearer token; constant-time comparison; 401/403 tests pass

metrics.name: Tool segregation
metrics.description: Read-only and mutating tools are separated by permission + approval
metrics.evidence: tools/compliance-gateway/src/policy.mjs: canAccessTool blocks mutating tools when canMutate=false; createToolRegistry filters by accessProfile

metrics.name: Separation of duties matrix
metrics.description: Documented SoD with board approval and quarterly review
metrics.evidence: docs/security/security-framework.md: SoD matrix with quarterly reviews; infra/security/policies/access-control.md: RBAC roles and permission structure

metrics.name: Break-glass procedure
metrics.description: Emergency access with time limits and mandatory post-incident review
metrics.evidence: docs/security/break-glass-procedure.md: 15-minute max session, two-person rule, auto-alerts, evidence requirements, regulatory traceability

pillars.name: Non-Proliferation
pillars.description: Preventing harmful capabilities from being exposed or misused

metrics.name: No public mutation path
metrics.description: query.gtcx.trade is not published until zero-trust boundary exists
metrics.evidence: tools/policy/check-security-control-boundaries.mjs: enforces query.gtcx.trade absence; CI step fails if re-added

metrics.name: Network segmentation
metrics.description: Pods communicate only via required ports; network traffic is logged for audit
metrics.evidence: infra/kubernetes/overlays/staging/network-policies.yaml: default-deny-all with explicit egress/ingress rules; infra/terraform/modules/flow-logs/main.tf: VPC Flow Logs for all traffic with 365-day retention

metrics.name: Container image signing enforcement
metrics.evidence: infra/kubernetes/base/policies/require-signed-images.yaml: Kyverno ClusterPolicy verifies Cosign signatures; build-push-ecr.yml signs images

metrics.name: mTLS service mesh
metrics.evidence: infra/kubernetes/overlays/production/linkerd/mesh-policies.yaml + namespace-annotations.yaml: deny-by-default Linkerd mesh policies; infra/kubernetes/overlays/staging/linkerd/: staging equivalents. Sidecar injection pending Q3 2026 (ADR-007).

pillars.name: Alignment
pillars.description: Runtime policy enforcement ensures AI behavior matches governance intent

metrics.name: Runtime policy prompt
metrics.description: LLM receives explicit runtime policy describing caller permissions
metrics.evidence: tools/compliance-gateway/src/policy.mjs: buildRuntimePolicyPrompt injects caller subject, permissions, and mutating-tool status into system prompt

metrics.name: Fail-closed behavior
metrics.description: Service refuses traffic when critical dependencies are unavailable
metrics.evidence: tools/replay-protection/src/server.mjs: returns 503 when Redis unavailable in production; tools/replay-protection/tests/production-fail-closed.test.mjs verifies

metrics.name: SIGNAL scorecard CI gate
metrics.description: Scorecard validation runs in CI and blocks PRs on regression
metrics.evidence: tools/scripts/validate-signal.mjs: validates schema, computes weighted score, fails CI if score < threshold; docs/audit/signal-scorecard.json: 5-pillar maturity scorecard
